review_reason: NoMaxOrder/NoMinOrder on RestrictedQuotient is unprovable for arbitrary root MCS. When GContent(M) = M (G-closed MCS), the restricted fragment is a singleton and NoMaxOrder is false. The theorem statement needs revision or the construction needs bulldozing/step-by-step approach.

partial_progress.details: Phase 5 (NoEndpoints) partially complete. Irreflexive cases proven for both NoMaxOrder and NoMinOrder. Reflexive cases blocked: when GContent(M) = M, the restricted fragment is a singleton. 2 sorries remain (one per instance). Phases 4 and 6-11 not started.

errors.message: NoMaxOrder (RestrictedQuotient M0 h_mcs0) is false for G-closed root MCS where GContent(M) = M. The Lindenbaum witness returns M itself, making the fragment a singleton.
errors.recommendation: Revise construction: (1) bulldozing to eliminate reflexive points, (2) step-by-step omega construction, (3) conditional NoMaxOrder with non-G-closed hypothesis, or (4) different quotient

completion_data.completion_summary: Phase 5 partial: proved irreflexive cases for NoMaxOrder/NoMinOrder using temp_4 and GH duality. Discovered that reflexive cases are unprovable as stated - G-closed MCSes produce singleton quotients where NoMaxOrder is false. The canonical model construction needs revision (bulldozing or step-by-step approach).
